indexes.name: story_creation_tags_pkey

constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (story_id) REFERENCES stories(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

indexes.name: feedbacks_pkey
indexes.def: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX feedbacks_pkey ON public.feedbacks USING btree (id)

indexes.name: idx_feedbacks_created_at
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX idx_feedbacks_created_at ON public.feedbacks USING btree (created_at DESC)

constraints.name: ck_feedbacks_platform
constraints.def: CHECK (((platform IS NULL) OR ((platform)::text = ANY ((ARRAY['IOS'::character varying, 'ANDROID'::character varying, 'WEB'::character varying])::text[]))))

indexes.name: ai_call_logs_pkey
indexes.def: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX ai_call_logs_pkey ON public.ai_call_logs USING btree (id)

indexes.name: idx_ai_call_logs_request_id
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX idx_ai_call_logs_request_id ON public.ai_call_logs USING btree (request_id)

indexes.name: idx_ai_call_logs_created_at
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX idx_ai_call_logs_created_at ON public.ai_call_logs USING btree (created_at DESC)

indexes.name: idx_ai_call_logs_story
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX idx_ai_call_logs_story ON public.ai_call_logs USING btree (story_id)

constraints.name: ck_ai_call_logs_feature
constraints.def: CHECK (((feature)::text = ANY ((ARRAY['storyline_generation'::character varying, 'story_completion'::character varying, 'chat_response'::character varying, 'suggestion_generation'::character varying])::text[])))

indexes.name: users_pkey
indexes.def: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX users_pkey ON public.users USING btree (id)

indexes.name: idx_social_accounts_user
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX idx_social_accounts_user ON public.social_accounts USING btree (user_id)

constraints.name: ck_social_accounts_provider
constraints.def: CHECK (((provider)::text = ANY ((ARRAY['GOOGLE'::character varying, 'KAKAO'::character varying, 'APPLE'::character varying, 'NAVER'::character varying])::text[])))

constraints.name: social_accounts_user_id_fkey
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

FOREIGN KEY (start_setting_id) REFERENCES story_start_settings(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

FOREIGN KEY (play_session_id) REFERENCES story_play_sessions(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
